# Omni Leads LLC
> À la carte digital marketing services — pick what you need, pay only for what you use.

## About
Omni Leads LLC is a digital marketing agency based in Salt Lake City, Utah.
We offer individual marketing services without bundles or long-term contracts.

## Services
- Google My Business Optimization ($299/mo): Full GMB profile setup, weekly posts, review management, photo optimization
- Content Writing ($150/article): 1,500+ word SEO articles with keyword research, internal linking, meta tags
- On-Page SEO ($499/mo): Full site audit, title/meta optimization, schema markup, Core Web Vitals
- Off-Page SEO & Link Building ($599/mo): Manual outreach, guest posts, niche backlinks, competitor analysis
- Directory Citations ($199 one-time): 50+ directory submissions, NAP consistency, duplicate cleanup
- Press Releases ($349/release): Professional copy, 400+ outlet distribution, Google News inclusion

## Contact
- Phone: (801) 898-7022
